caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Every supplied SOC must be mechanically judged, but the veterinary-dominated 4-digit mix is not a valid occupation proxy for 541990.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The RESIDUAL share is 44.82% and dominates the result; target-level job mapping is mandatory before underwriting.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: GraphCast demonstrates weather-forecasting capability but does not establish replaceability in appraisal or inspection firms.
inputs.pi_dist: No code-wide pricing or margin study was reopened; this is a heterogeneous-segment judgment.
inputs.pi_moat: Do not infer a universal legal credential barrier from USPAP or professional-organization requirements.
inputs.t50_years: No representative 541990 adoption survey was found; weather-model evidence is not adoption evidence for all subsegments.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: This is not an observed industry adoption statistic.
inputs.historical_analogs: No uniform historical analogue applies to every activity in this catch-all NAICS code.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: This is a US small-business age proxy, not a NAICS 541990 measurement.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: A target may still have a genuine succession issue, but it must be confirmed in diligence.
inputs.active_consolidators: There is no verified code-wide consolidator count; this input must be replaced after selecting a precise subsegment.
inputs.buy_mult: The source is national service-business data and reports seller's discretionary earnings/cash flow, not 541990 adjusted EBITDA.
inputs.exit_mult: This is not an exit-market forecast and deliberately excludes a platform-multiple thesis.
inputs.pricing_structure: No code-wide pricing mix is available; capture cannot be underwritten until a subsegment and target are specified.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $261,287 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541990); class <5: 18,002 firms, avg revenue/firm $408,515 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $63,933 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,791 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,600,634 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $250,499 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 911 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,055,095 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $478,122 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 717 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,186,007 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,437,610 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 146 firms, avg revenue/firm $36,320,979 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $5,684,233 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 123 firms, avg revenue/firm $86,630,772 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $13,557,716 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 863

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: The deterministic 4-digit role mix is expressly contaminated by veterinary occupations, so it cannot be read as this code's work composition. Use only a conservative task estimate for the hypothesized inspection/appraisal cluster: AI is strong in drafting, research, client administration, and analytical output but weak in field observation, accountability, and relationship work.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541990 ($27,219,781,409) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541990 ($35,548,824,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: Publishable with caveats. All deterministic mechanics and exact-artifact checks pass and all seven registered sources resolve. The sources support the residual-code boundary, appraisal-standard qualifications, weather-model capability, broad service-business multiples, and general owner-age context. The record's low-confidence thesis remains useful because it explicitly refuses to treat 541990 as one acquisition market and preserves the decisive occupation-mix, labor-share, subsegment, pricing, adoption, buyer-count, and valuation caveats.

sources.title: 2022 NAICS 541990 All Other Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
sources.what_it_supports: Official code definition and illustrative activities including non-real-estate appraisal, marine survey, commodity and visual inspection, patent brokerage, arbitration, and weather forecasting.

sources.title: The Appraisal Foundation: USPAP
sources.what_it_supports: USPAP's cross-discipline scope, its guidance on AI tools, and the fact that non-real-property applicability can depend on law, client policy, contract, or membership.

sources.title: The Appraisal Foundation: Personal Property Appraisal
sources.what_it_supports: Personal-property experience and education recommendations, professional designations, and the explicit statement that a credential is not legally required to practice personal-property appraisal.

sources.title: Google DeepMind: GraphCast AI model for faster and more accurate global weather forecasting
sources.what_it_supports: AI weather-forecasting capability: under-one-minute 10-day forecasts and the author's reported comparison with HRES; it is technology evidence, not a revenue-share study for 541990.

sources.title: BizBuySell Service Business Valuation Multiples & Financial Benchmarks
sources.what_it_supports: National service-business sold earnings-multiple data: 2.58x average for 2021-25, 2.70x average for 2025, defined as seller's discretionary earnings/cash flow rather than EBITDA.

sources.title: BizBuySell 2025 Fourth Quarter Insight Report
sources.what_it_supports: 2025 service-sector transaction context and a reported 2.52 average cash-flow multiple; it is a broad market benchmark, not a 541990 comp set.

sources.title: AP: Starting a small business is hard. Exiting can be even harder
sources.what_it_supports: Census-attributed general small-business succession context: about 51% of owners are over 55; this is not a NAICS 541990 owner-age measure.

title: All Other Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
